name: Color Number Shooter Game
description: Step into the world of color shooter challenge games. The ultimate reflex and precision-based arcade game that will keep you glued to your screen for hours! In this addictive and fast-paced game, your mission is simple yet thrilling — shoot the rotating circle, reduce its number to zero, and conquer every level in the number shooter game. But don’t be fooled by its minimalistic design — each level brings new twists, faster rotations, and mind-bending challenges that test your focus, speed, and accuracy. Whether you’re a casual gamer looking for a fun way to pass the time or a competitive player aiming for high scores.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
